Sample_Description: The five-blade computer cooling-fan example from demo_collection(), with a large hub and broad blades. Root-to-tip loft order is selected because that order converges for this geometry.

Sample_Description_i18n.en: The five-blade computer cooling-fan example from demo_collection(), with a large hub and broad blades.
Sample_Description_i18n.pt-BR: Exemplo de ventoinha de computador de demo_collection(), com cinco pás largas e hub de grande diâmetro. A ordem raiz para ponta foi selecionada porque converge para esta geometria.
Sample_Description_i18n.es: Ejemplo de ventilador de ordenador de demo_collection(), con cinco palas anchas y un cubo grande.
Sample_Description_i18n.fr: Exemple de ventilateur informatique de demo_collection(), avec cinq pales larges et un grand moyeu.
Sample_Description_i18n.de: Computerlüfter-Beispiel aus demo_collection() mit fünf breiten Blättern und großer Nabe.
Sample_Description_i18n.ru: Пример компьютерного вентилятора из demo_collection() с пятью широкими лопастями и большой ступицей.

Source.Adaptation_Notes: The separate hub cylinder is represented by Hub_Length=16 mm; no bore was present.
